description: Style NoteStylish to a T and a champion performance Sports shoe, these Vermont shoes from adidas are a great buy. Offering superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish, these shoes can be teamed with jeans and a tee when you're not playing sport.Product DetailsWhite shoe with mesh upper, synthetic overlays, Adidas 3 patented stripes on either sides and branding on the collar and tonguePadded and meshed tongue and innerPhylon midsole and padded footbed for exemplary comfortTPU outsole with curved midfoot, arrow shaped nubs and deep flex groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
